all_candidates.topic: Should social media platforms allow AI image generation from public photos?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Meta recently decided that anyone can generate AI images of users from their public Instagram accounts, reported on July 11-12, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Are AI-driven silent layoffs justified for productivity?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's IT sector projects up to 35,000 job cuts in 2026 due to AI integration and productivity focus, with 'silent layoffs' being the new norm, reported on July 9-12, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should tour operators be held more accountable for tourist safety abroad?
all_candidates.news_anchor: At least 15 Indian tourists were killed after a speedboat capsized in Vietnam around July 10-12, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should India's fuel prices remain stable despite global crude fluctuations?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Petrol and diesel prices in India remained unchanged on July 9, 2026, despite global crude price movements, with the Oil Minister stating that lowering prices is not a legitimate idea.

all_candidates.topic: Should Delhi restrict new petrol/diesel vehicle registrations?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Delhi government's new EV Policy 2.0, announced around July 10, 2026, proposes gradually restricting registrations of petrol, diesel, and CNG vehicles.

all_candidates.topic: Should food delivery platforms be held liable for vendor quality?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Swiggy recently received 9 notices from FSSAI regarding rotten eggs and spoiled parathas from its vendors.

all_candidates.topic: Should urban development prioritize disaster resilience over rapid expansion?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Heavy rains caused landslips in Shimla on July 11, 2026, affecting houses, and a building collapsed in Pune on July 11, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should the government directly provide free AI upskilling courses?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Government of India announced a free AI course, YUVA AI for ALL, on July 11, 2026, offering certificates for upskilling.

all_candidates.topic: Should food regulators impose stricter penalties for misleading claims?
all_candidates.news_anchor: FSSAI issued a notice to Heritage Foods on July 7, 2026, for misleading 'Fresh Paneer' claims, asking for an explanation within 7 days.

all_candidates.topic: Should AI-powered surveillance cameras be widely adopted in public spaces?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Qubo recently unveiled AI-powered cameras with real-time threat detection around July 12, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is India's shift to electric public transport happening fast enough?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari called for stronger BRICS cooperation on sustainable transport systems on July 11, 2026, highlighting India's electric bus deployments.

all_candidates.topic: Should universities restructure undergraduate degrees to include 4-year programs?
all_candidates.news_anchor: DU teachers objected to fourth-year credit restructuring in the undergraduate curriculum around July 12, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should government digital services prioritize cybersecurity over accessibility?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Kerala police's internal app experienced a suspected cyber attack around July 10, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should AI development be slowed to reduce its carbon footprint?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Microsoft recently reported a 25% rise in carbon emissions, attributing it to the rapid expansion of AI data centers.

all_candidates.topic: Should India focus on building its own AI infrastructure?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw stated on July 11, 2026, that India plans to augment its AI compute capacity.

all_candidates.topic: Should AI be used for judicial decision-making?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant stated on July 11, 2026, that AI should assist and not decide equities.

all_candidates.topic: Will GST administration overhaul truly simplify tax compliance?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Indian government has prepared plans for a major restructuring of tax administration, including the CBEC, to ensure a glitch-free GST rollout, reported on July 9, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Should the government tighten regulations on alcohol-based medicines?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Centre tightened rules on alcohol-based medicines around July 11, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is the PM Gati Shakti plan effectively speeding up infrastructure projects?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari highlighted on July 11, 2026, how the PM Gati Shakti National Master Plan has transformed infrastructure planning.

all_candidates.topic: Should India further ease business regulations to attract investment?
all_candidates.news_anchor: PM Modi chaired a high-level meeting of secretaries on June 30, 2026, reviewing measures to strengthen India's investment climate and ease of doing business.
